meaning: n.保证,誓言,抵押,抵押品vt.保证,使发誓,抵押,典当,举杯祝...健康
examples: In the treaty both sides pledge to respect human rights.
He asked her to pledge the house as security for a loan.
The government had retreated from its pledge to reduce class sizes.
It's the Republican leadership's call whether to trust Trump on any pledge he may make.
The rest of the signatories were required to pledge not to acquire nuclear weapons.
